_doc: Per-image Gemini prompts for The AI Image Bible. {palette} resolves at runtime. Follows feedback_image_prompt_construction.md rules.

cover.prompt:
Editorial book cover for a downloadable lead magnet PDF. Aspect: portrait, 3:4, US letter book cover proportions.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text. No font names. No instructions. No labels beyond what is listed.
2. Never render the words "Inter", "Inter Regular", "Inter Display Bold", "JetBrains Mono", "sans serif", or any typography or font instruction inside the image.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character. No garbled or distorted characters. No misspellings.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: FREE BIBLE
B. Upper-left massive headline across three lines: line 1 reads "The AI", line 2 reads "Image", line 3 reads "Bible".
C. Subtitle inside a horizontal off-white translucent panel below the headline, two lines: line 1 reads "gpt-image-2, Midjourney V8.1, Gemini 3 Pro.", line 2 reads "Every prompt pattern. Every payload. April 2026."
D. Below the subtitle panel, a small uppercase label, three words: INSIDE THIS BIBLE
E. A grid of 8 small pills below the INSIDE THIS BIBLE label, arranged as 2 rows of 4 pills. The 4 pills in the top row read, left to right: "Gemini 3 Pro", "Midjourney", "gpt-image-2", "JSON Prompting". The 4 pills in the bottom row read, left to right: "Interleaved", "Character Ref", "Hex Codes", "Cinematic".
F. Bottom-left small wordmark: AI BrandFactory

TYPOGRAPHY (apply these settings; do not display the setting names):
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF, tight letter spacing.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B color, centered inside the off-white panel.
- Top-left pill text: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- INSIDE THIS BIBLE label: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4, small.
- Pill grid text: clean sans-serif medium weight, off-white #FAF9FF, small. Each pill is a rounded rectangle with a thin bright cyan #06B6D4 outline and a translucent dark indigo fill.
- Wordmark: clean light-weight sans-serif, off-white.

Design language:
- Premium funnel-art style in the spirit of Peng Joon and Russell Brunson, stripped of ornament.
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B to electric purple #7C3AED diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a subtle radial bloom of bright cyan in the upper right.
- Layout: headline and subtitle in the upper half, pill grid in the middle to lower portion.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan, upper-right to middle-left.
- Subtle grain texture across the whole frame.

Color palette: {palette}.

What to avoid:
- No camera icons, no shutter icons, no image-viewer UI, no camera aperture patterns.
- No human faces, no avatars, no icons inside the pills.
- No code text rendered legibly anywhere.
- No stock photos, no AI illustrations, no emoji, no clip art.
- No gradients other than the indigo to purple base.
- No OpenAI, Midjourney, or Google brand logos.
- No additional pills, badges, or text beyond the 8 listed.

Output: a single high-quality cover image, print-ready, 4K.

hero.prompt:
Wide hero banner for a squeeze page that gives away "The AI Image Bible". Aspect: 16:9.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
- This image contains NO rendered text.
- Do not render font names, typography labels, or instructions anywhere.

Composition: a 3D-rendered isometric mockup of a US-letter PDF cover floating on the right third of the frame with a soft drop shadow on a textured editorial background. On the left two-thirds: a faint repeating image-grid motif in #06B6D4 at 12 percent opacity (abstract rounded rectangles arranged in a 3x3 grid suggesting a gallery). A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third.

Background:
- Top half: deep indigo #1A0B4B fading to electric purple #7C3AED.
- Bottom half: off-white #FAF9FF with a faint mesh gradient bloom.
- The PDF mockup sits on the dividing line.
- Subtle paper grain across the whole frame.

Style:
- Premium editorial, restrained.
- No people, no faces, no stock photography, no camera icons, no code text.
- No platform brand logos.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single 4K hero image.

og.prompt:
Open Graph social share card image, 1.91:1 widescreen aspect.

CRITICAL TEXT-RENDERING RULES (read first):
1. The image must contain ONLY the text pieces listed under TEXT TO RENDER below. No other text.
2. Never render font names or typography instructions.
3. Spell every rendered word exactly as written, character for character.

TEXT TO RENDER (exactly these pieces, nothing else):
A. Top-left small pill, uppercase, two words: AI BRANDFACTORY
B. Centered massive headline across two lines: line 1 reads "The AI", line 2 reads "Image Bible".
C. Below the headline, inside a horizontal off-white rounded pill, one line of subtitle text: gpt-image-2, Midjourney V8.1, Gemini 3 Pro. April 2026.
D. Below the subtitle pill, a single horizontal text strip showing the concepts covered, separated by middle-dot bullets, all on one line: Gemini 3 Pro · Midjourney · gpt-image-2 · JSON Prompting · Interleaved · Character Ref · Hex Codes · Cinematic
E. Bottom-right small label, slightly faded: files.aibrandfactory.com

TYPOGRAPHY:
- Top-left pill: condensed mono-spaced face, bright cyan #06B6D4.
- Headline: massive bold sans-serif display face, off-white #FAF9FF.
- Subtitle: clean medium-weight sans-serif, slate #1E293B inside the off-white pill.
- Concepts text strip: clean medium-weight sans-serif, bright cyan #06B6D4, smaller size.
- Bottom-right label: clean sans-serif, off-white at 70% opacity.

Background: deep indigo to electric purple diagonal gradient at 135 degrees, with a faded image-grid motif on the right third in bright cyan at low opacity. A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper third.

What to avoid:
- No people, no faces, no camera icons, no clip art, no emoji.
- No OpenAI, Midjourney, or Google brand logos.
- No additional text beyond the pieces listed above.

Crisp print-grade typography. Color palette: {palette}.

Output: sharp, ready as og:image.

notion-cover.prompt:
Wide editorial banner image for a Notion page header. Aspect 21:9.

CRITICAL CONSTRAINT: the image must contain NO title, NO headline, NO wordmark, NO logo, NO labels in the corners. Do not render font names or typography instructions.

Composition:
- Background: deep indigo #1A0B4B on the left fading to electric purple #7C3AED on the right, with a subtle bright cyan #06B6D4 bloom in the upper right.
- Across the entire frame edge-to-edge, an abstract horizontal image-gallery composition: a row of 9 to 12 rounded rectangles of varying proportions (some portrait, some landscape, some square) arranged in a loose cascading row. Each rectangle has a clean off-white outline on the indigo-to-purple background. The composition reads as a gallery of image frames.
- A single thin diagonal accent line in bright cyan crosses the upper portion from upper-left to mid-right.
- Subtle paper grain texture.

What to avoid:
- No corner text. No wordmark. No logos.
- No platform brand logos.
- No camera icons, no shutter icons, no image-viewer UI.
- No text or labels inside any of the rectangles.
- No emoji, no clip art.

Color palette: {palette}.

Output: a single high-quality 4K cinematic banner.
